steps.title: Compare both disadvantages
steps.content: The student wants a comparison of disadvantages. Wairakei uses flash steam, whose disadvantage is needing geothermal reservoirs above 180 degrees C. Traunreut uses binary cycle technology, whose disadvantage is higher maintenance costs.

steps.title: Pick the direct trade-off
steps.content: Choice A gives only Wairakei's temperature limitation. Choice B gives only Traunreut's cost disadvantage. Choice D compares operating temperatures but omits the maintenance-cost drawback. The answer is C.
